label: 2022 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 18

extraction.one_line_summary: EVENEPOEL Remco attacked inside 200m to take the uphill finish at Pico Jano, denying HESSING Rob's long solo breakaway and gaining 6 seconds on MAS Enric.
tactical_patterns: EVENEPOEL defended by attacking when rivals repeatedly probed, converting defensive liability into bonus seconds with late 200m punch
HESSING Rob went solo from GC-loaded break when attacks stalled, nearly succeeding from domestique role against superior climbers
ALMEIDA João used teammates SOLER and OLIVEIRA in earlier break as bridge tools when attacking from red jersey group
CARTHY Hugh detonated oversized 43-rider break deliberately before ARMIRAIL could bridge, protecting stage opportunity from GC infiltration

rider_signals.VINE Jay: negative: abandoned after crash with multiple riders including PEDERSEN and RODRÍGUEZ, surrendering active KOM lead
rider_signals.RODRÍGUEZ Carlos: neutral: crashed early but finished with group despite visible struggle, resilience signal for final stages
rider_signals.HESSING Rob: positive: solo attacking capability from domestique role nearly successful against elite GC climbers, 200m from victory
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: positive: defended by attacking repeatedly, then found acceleration at 200m on summit finish to take bonus seconds
rider_signals.CARAPAZ Richard: positive: prioritized KOM points over stage win by pacing RODRÍGUEZ to line, took modest 20-point lead
rider_signals.ALMEIDA João: negative: organized bridge effort with team support but lost time, dropped to sixth overall despite aggressive tactics
rider_signals.MAS Enric: negative: lost 6 seconds and time gap increased to 2:07 despite tracking EVENEPOEL's moves on summit finish
rider_signals.LÓPEZ Miguel Ángel: neutral: team Astana chased to protect GC position relative to ALMEIDA, defensive rather than opportunistic
rider_signals.HIGUITA Sergio: neutral: part of final selection from break but unable to compete for stage against EVENEPOEL's late kick
